statements.__comment: Create EXPOSE rels from exposed LBs to private VMs behind them
statements.query: MATCH (s:AzureSubscription{id: $AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(lb:AzureLoadBalancer{exposed_internet: true})-[:CONTAINS]->(:AzureLoadBalancerBackendPool)-[:ROUTES_TO]->(nic:AzureNetworkInterface)-[:ATTACHED_TO]->(vm:AzureVirtualMachine) WHERE NOT (nic)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH]->(:AzurePublicIPAddress) MERGE (lb)-[r:EXPOSE]->(vm) SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.exposure_type = 'via_lb_only'

statements.__comment: Cleanup stale EXPOSE rels from LBs in this subscription. Runs after the MERGE so concurrent readers never observe a missing edge.
